name: python3-chardet
title: python3-chardet
description:
Universal Character Encoding Detector (Python3)
Chardet is a continuation of Mark Pilgrim's excellent original chardet port
from C, and Ian Cordasco's charade Python 3-compatible fork.
Chardet takes a sequence of bytes in an unknown character encoding, and
attempts to determine the encoding.
.
Supported encodings:
* Big5, GB2312/GB18030, EUC-TW, HZ-GB-2312, and ISO-2022-CN (Traditional
and Simplified Chinese)
* EUC-JP, SHIFT_JIS, and ISO-2022-JP (Japanese)
* EUC-KR and ISO-2022-KR (Korean)
* KOI8-R, MacCyrillic, IBM855, IBM866, ISO-8859-5, and windows-1251 (Russian)
* ISO-8859-2 and windows-1250 (Hungarian)
* ISO-8859-5 and windows-1251 (Bulgarian)
* ISO-8859-1 and windows-1252 (Western European languages)
* ISO-8859-7 and windows-1253 (Greek)
* ISO-8859-8 and windows-1255 (Visual and Logical Hebrew)
* TIS-620 (Thai)
* UTF-32 BE, LE, 3412-ordered, or 2143-ordered (with a BOM)
* UTF-16 BE or LE (with a BOM)
* UTF-8 (with or without a BOM)
* ASCII
.
This library is a port of the auto-detection code in Mozilla.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chardetect because Universal Character Encoding Detector (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chardetect as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chardetect with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chardetect --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install chardet. Universal Character Encoding Detector (Python3).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Universal Character Encoding Detector (Python3).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: chardet - universal character encoding detector.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install chardet
Install with: sudo apt install chardet
